Capabilities

What I Do

SEO & Strategy

Comprehensive search engine optimization retainers, structured keyword frameworks, technical audits, and content maps built to scale organic visibility.

Learn More →

Training & Education

Hands-on training batches at NDMIT and ASDC Kanpur. Instructing over 300+ students and corporate teams in live, performance-driven digital marketing.

Learn More →

Meta Ads & Performance

Strategic campaigns targeted toward ROI. Setting up landing pages, optimizing ad creatives, custom conversion events, and budgeting algorithms.

Learn More →

Automation & AI

Building autonomous workflows using n8n and HubSpot CRM. Setting up automated email/SMS lead notifications, CRM routing, and database syncing.

Learn More →

Web Development

Developing responsive, fast-loading, SEO-ready agency and brand websites. Delivering 8 live client sites using clean, optimized frontend architectures.

Learn More →

Social Media

Social presence management and growth. Implementing organic strategies, reels distribution, and local visibility driving over 27K+ monthly impressions.

Learn More →
